SEARCH
Package pe.ask.persistence.core.helper

Class ReactiveOperationsHelper<D,E,I,R extends org.springframework.data.repository.reactive.ReactiveCrudRepository<E,I> & org.springframework.data.repository.query.ReactiveQueryByExampleExecutor<E>>

java.lang.Object
pe.ask.persistence.core.helper.ReactiveOperationsHelper<D,E,I,R>
Type Parameters:
D - the domain model type
E - the entity model type
I - the identifier type
R - the reactive repository type extending ReactiveCrudRepository and ReactiveQueryByExampleExecutor
public abstract class ReactiveOperationsHelper<D,E,I,R extends org.springframework.data.repository.reactive.ReactiveCrudRepository<E,I> & org.springframework.data.repository.query.ReactiveQueryByExampleExecutor<E>> extends Object
Helper base class for reactive operations, providing generic CRUD functionality.

Bridges the gap between domain models and database entities using a generic bean mapper. It includes methods for saving, finding, patching, and paginating records.

    • getRepository

      protected R getRepository()
      Gets the current repository instance.

      protected E toEntity(D domain)
      Converts a domain model to an entity.

      domain - the domain model
      Returns:

    • toDomain

      protected D toDomain(E domain)
      Converts an entity to a domain model.
      Parameters:
      domain - the entity
      Returns:
      the corresponding domain model

    • save

      public reactor.core.publisher.Mono<D> save(D domain)
      Saves a domain model.
      Parameters:
      domain - the domain model to save
      Returns:
      a Mono emitting the saved domain model

    • saveAll

      public reactor.core.publisher.Flux<D> saveAll(reactor.core.publisher.Flux<D> domains)
      Saves multiple domain models.
      Parameters:
      domains - a Flux of domain models to save
      Returns:
      a Flux emitting the saved domain models

    • findById

      public reactor.core.publisher.Mono<D> findById(I id)
      Finds a domain model by its identifier.
      Parameters:
      id - the identifier
      Returns:
      a Mono emitting the domain model if found

    • existsById

      public reactor.core.publisher.Mono<Boolean> existsById(I id)
      Checks if a domain model exists by its identifier.
      Parameters:
      id - the identifier
      Returns:
      a Mono emitting true if it exists, false otherwise

    • count

      public reactor.core.publisher.Mono<Long> count()
      Counts the total number of domain models.
      Returns:
      a Mono emitting the total count

    • findByExample

      public reactor.core.publisher.Flux<D> findByExample(D domain)
      Finds domain models matching the given example.
      Parameters:
      domain - the example domain model
      Returns:
      a Flux emitting the matching domain models

    • findAll

      public reactor.core.publisher.Flux<D> findAll()
      Finds all domain models.
      Returns:
      a Flux emitting all domain models

    • findPaginated

      public reactor.core.publisher.Mono<PageResponse<D>> findPaginated(D domain, int page, int size, String sort, String direction)
      Finds a paginated list of domain models matching the given example with sorting.
      Parameters:
      domain - the example domain model
      page - the page number
      size - the page size
      sort - the sort field
      direction - the sort direction
      Returns:
      a Mono emitting the paginated response

    • findPaginated

      public reactor.core.publisher.Mono<PageResponse<D>> findPaginated(D domain, int page, int size)

      page - the page number
      size - the page size
      Returns:
      a Mono emitting the paginated response

      Parameters:
      page - the page number
      size - the page size
      Returns:
      a Mono emitting the paginated response
